rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (6/10) and raise the identical three concerns (no Python, short of 8+ years AI-specific experience, no RAG/vector databases), with strengths that are reworded but substantively the same (AI-agent infrastructure, staff-level breadth, mentorship). Nothing in the variant penalizes, questions, or even references the changed location (India), and no new concern or shifted reasoning keys off it. The wording differences fall within ordinary run-to-run noise.
